#lifestyleblogger #punefoodblogger #pune #punelifestyle #fyp

So guys, the mango festival is on at Meridian Ice Cream near Amanora Park Town 🥭✨

In reel
1)Mango shake, 
2)Mango Malai
3)Mango with Cream
4)Mango mastani
5)Mango bowl. 

My personal favorite was the mango bowl and mango with cream 😍

Perfect spot for all mango lovers, don’t miss it!
Highly Recommded ✅️

Visit with your Gang 👭👬
Keep following @__foodbyprriyaa__ !

📍Meridian Ice Cream - Amanora
Amanora Town Centre, Hadapsar, Pune
(Available on Maps)

My summer escape ♥️✨

We found the prettiest cafe inside a wada in Pune. Every corner of this place is thoughtfully decorated and feels completely like home 🥰

Have you visited this place? Let me know in the comments 💌

Probably one of my favourite photos of all time 🫶🏻

Best enjoyed fresh out of the tin… trust me, you don’t want to miss this one 🤎🔥

Happiness in my hand. 🫠

@swaati_kulfi 

• Authentically Handcrafted: Experience the rich, dense texture of traditional kulfi made with time-honored techniques.
• Pure Ingredients: We use 100% whole milk for a creamy, luscious finish—no shortcuts, no compromises.
• The Ultimate Variety: Choose from 30+ vibrant ice cream flavors, all served in your favorite crispy waffle cone.
• Chowpatty Classics: Enjoy our signature Natural Chowpatty Kulfi, available in authentic sticks or slices.
• Affordable Luxury: Premium quality that stays pocket-friendly, making every day a good day for dessert.

#summervibes #PuneFoodie #PuneFoodBlogger #Swaatikulfi

Beat the heat with a refreshing glass of Strawberry Lassi. Creamy, chilled, and bursting with fruity flavor, it’s the perfect summer drink to cool you down. Taste the best lassi at the best thali restaurant in Pune at Ghevar Thali. It will surely brighten your mood.
Wanna Try Today?😍😍

Add: LG 16, Panache Mall, Tiranga Chouk, Datta Nagar Road, Katraj, Pune - 411 046
For Bookings: 703 000 6477 / 703 000 6476

All about Miya Kebabs 😋
 at Balewadi High Street.
It is biggest outlate,now in Baner.
Really delicious lip smacking.😋😋
...............
..............
If do you want to taste,please must go for that,kebabs khaye ke aap ke dil bhar uthega,aur Dil mange more aap bologe.
...............
..............
There are lots of varities in their menu,but thodi der waiting aapko karna padega,because rush kaafi hota reheta hai.
...............
..............
We have tried,
1.Butter Chicken Roll
2.Zaatar Naan(Must try full of cheese world)
3.Chicken Changezi Tikka(2 Naans ishke saath aate hai side pe)
...................
...................
Abhi taak agar try nehi kiye to please jaldi bhago aur kebabs ka maza lelo...😘
...............
Location @miyakebabs 
Photography @drjayita 
Address:First Floor, Solitaire Business Hub, Unit 105, Balewadi High St, Baner, Pune, Maharashtra 411045

caption:
Noble Force Welfare | Student Safety & Rights Matter 🛡️🧑‍🎓
The current news cycle makes one thing clear: our students are facing unprecedented challenges.
From tragic student suicides in Kurukshetra that led to government intervention to the heartbreaking death in Kerala linked to loan app pressure, a serious national-level crisis regarding student safety is unfolding.
Simultaneously, the demand for student union elections is growing, and students in Pune continue to protest excessive and unauthorized fees. These actions reflect a major student welfare movement that cannot be ignored.
Join us in demanding justice, safety, and a future where institutional pressure is replaced by support. Support the protest! 📧 nobleforcewelfare@gmail.com

#student #studentissues #kerela #punefoodblogger #indiapictures
